name: Spiritual Weapon
description: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range that lasts for the duration or until you cast this spell again. When you cast the spell, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of the weapon. On a hit, the target takes force damage equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. As a bonus action on your turn, you can move the weapon up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it.
effect: Summons a floating spectral weapon. Initial melee spell attack on cast. Each subsequent turn: bonus action to move it up to 20 feet and attack again. Does not require concentration.
notes: Cast as a bonus action; attacks on subsequent turns also cost a bonus action
Does NOT require concentration — can maintain alongside concentration spells
Damage includes spellcasting modifier (modeled as +3 fixed)
Engine gap: persistent summoned attacker that acts on bonus action each turn needs engine support [~]
Modeled by primary melee spell_attack shape; full per-turn-bonus-action-attack requires engine support
